'''shozhazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabelloid|sabelloid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabelloid|sabelloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shozhazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozhazhithi|shozhazhithi]] || [[word:shozhazhiji|shozhazhiji]] || [[word:shozhazhishi|shozhazhishi]] || [[word:shozhazhiki|shozhazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozhazhuthuthu|shozhazhuthuthu]] || [[word:shozhazhujuju|shozhazhujuju]] || [[word:shozhazhushushu|shozhazhushushu]] || [[word:shozhazhukuku|shozhazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozhazhuthu|shozhazhuthu]] || [[word:shozhazhuju|shozhazhuju]] || [[word:shozhazhushu|shozhazhushu]] || [[word:shozhazhuku|shozhazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozhazhufthuf|shozhazhufthuf]] || [[word:shozhazhufjuf|shozhazhufjuf]] || [[word:shozhazhufshuf|shozhazhufshuf]] || [[word:shozhazhufkuf|shozhazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozhazhethe|shozhazhethe]] || [[word:shozhazheje|shozhazheje]] || [[word:shozhazheshe|shozhazheshe]] || [[word:shozhazheke|shozhazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozhazhothotho|shozhazhothotho]] || [[word:shozhazhojojo|shozhazhojojo]] || [[word:shozhazhoshosho|shozhazhoshosho]] || [[word:shozhazhokoko|shozhazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozhazhotho|shozhazhotho]] || [[word:shozhazhojo|shozhazhojo]] || [[word:shozhazhosho|shozhazhosho]] || [[word:shozhazhoko|shozhazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozhazhofthof|shozhazhofthof]] || [[word:shozhazhofjof|shozhazhofjof]] || [[word:shozhazhofshof|shozhazhofshof]] || [[word:shozhazhofkof|shozhazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shozhazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŠthĂŠ|shozhazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŠjĂŠ|shozhazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŠshĂŠ|shozhazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shozhazhĂŠkĂŠ|shozhazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shozhazhathatha|shozhazhathatha]] || [[word:shozhazhajaja|shozhazhajaja]] || [[word:shozhazhashasha|shozhazhashasha]] || [[word:shozhazhakaka|shozhazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shozhazhatha|shozhazhatha]] || [[word:shozhazhaja|shozhazhaja]] || [[word:shozhazhasha|shozhazhasha]] || [[word:shozhazhaka|shozhazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shozhazhafthaf|shozhazhafthaf]] || [[word:shozhazhafjaf|shozhazhafjaf]] || [[word:shozhazhafshaf|shozhazhafshaf]] || [[word:shozhazhafkaf|shozhazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shozhazhasha|shozhazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozhazhshĂ«sha|shozhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozhazhrosha|shozhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozhazhmusha|shozhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozhazhyasha|shozhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozhazhnkshĂ«sha|goshozhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozhazhnkrosha|goshozhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozhazhnkmusha|goshozhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozhazhnkyasha|goshozhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shozhazhazhasha|shozhazhazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozhazhazhshĂ«sha|shozhazhazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozhazhazhrosha|shozhazhazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozhazhazhmusha|shozhazhazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozhazhazhyasha|shozhazhazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozhazhazhnkshĂ«sha|goshozhazhazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozhazhazhnkrosha|goshozhazhazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozhazhazhnkmusha|goshozhazhazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozhazhazhnkyasha|goshozhazhazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shezhĂŠzhasha|shezhĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shezhĂŠzhshĂ«sha|shezhĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shezhĂŠzhrosha|shezhĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shezhĂŠzhmusha|shezhĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shezhĂŠzhyasha|shezhĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshezhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|goshezhĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshezhĂŠzhnkrosha|goshezhĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshezhĂŠzhnkmusha|goshezhĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshezhĂŠzhnkyasha|goshezhĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shozhfazhasha|shozhfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shozhfazhshĂ«sha|shozhfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shozhfazhrosha|shozhfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shozhfazhmusha|shozhfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shozhfazhyasha|shozhfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshozhfazhnkshĂ«sha|goshozhfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshozhfazhnkrosha|goshozhfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshozhfazhnkmusha|goshozhfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshozhfazhnkyasha|goshozhfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
